overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character waiting at a city crosswalk and then crossing a multi-lane street. The scene features modern downtown architecture with palm trees, office buildings, and moderate vehicle traffic on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corner with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: green sports car drives past the intersection from left to right
character shifts weight and prepares to step onto the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner near the traffic pole, observing passing vehicles before crossing

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving down the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad white striped pedestrian crossing marking the street
tall silver pole with pedestrian signal box attached
multi-story brown brick office tower with grid windows
modern dark glass facade building with reflective windows
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk across the street

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a downtown street corner on a sunny day, positioned next to a traffic light pole. The crosswalk stretches across the multi-lane road ahead, with a brown office building visible across the street and palm trees lining the far sidewalk. Vehicles including a green sports car pass by as the character observes the traffic.

events.description: character steps off the curb and begins walking across the crosswalk
silver sedan drives past on the perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the white-striped crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in white shirt crossing the street alongside the character
red sedan driving past the crosswalk on the left side

entered.detail: highway overpass visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing the wide street, walking over the white crosswalk stripes. A woman in white crosses alongside, while a red sedan passes by on the left. The brown office building that was on the right is now on the left side of the frame as the camera moves forward, and the traffic light pole recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stationary wait at a city corner to a forward progression across a busy downtown intersection. It begins with the character positioned by a traffic light pole on a sunny day, observing a green sports car and other vehicles pass by while facing a brown office building and palm trees across the street. As the character steps forward, the camera advances over the white stripes of the crosswalk, moving alongside a woman in white. The scene then shifts as the traffic light pole recedes into the background and the brown office building transitions from the right to the left side of the frame. The movement concludes as the character continues across the wide road, passing a red sedan on the left.
